title: SpawnAgent
description: Request to spawn an NPC in the simulator.

agentType.description: The type of agent to spawn

typeId.description: Type ID of the agent to spawn.

laneId.description: Id of the lane to spawn the agent on.

speedBiasMph.description: Bias of the agent to drive over/under.

followDistanceMeters.description: Desired follow distance parameter of the agent.

lengthMeters.description: Length of the agent in meters.

startVelocityMetersSecond.description: Starting velocity in meters per second.

routePlan.description: The planned route of the agent in vertex IDs.
